name: huawei-cloud
description: Query Huawei Cloud resources and monitoring data via SDK

tools.name: huawei_list_ecs
tools.description: List Huawei Cloud ECS instances with pagination

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_get_ecs_metrics
tools.description: Get ECS instance monitoring metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_stop_ecs_instance
tools.description: 关闭（关机）指定的ECS实例。默认执行正常关机（SOFT），支持强制关机（HARD）。操作前需确认，危险操作必须携带 confirm=true。

stop_type.description: 关机类型: SOFT(正常关机) 或 HARD(强制关机)，默认: SOFT

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选)

confirm.description: 二次确认，必须设为 true 才执行关机操作

tools.name: huawei_start_ecs_instance
tools.description: 启动（开机）指定的ECS实例。用于将已关机的ECS实例重新开机。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选)

tools.name: huawei_list_supported_regions
tools.description: List all supported Huawei Cloud regions. Returns region IDs, names, and descriptions for both China mainland and international regions. No credentials required.

tools.description: List all projects (tenants) available for the account using IAM API. Returns project IDs for all regions, and optionally filters by domain_id or specific region name.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

tools.name: huawei_get_project_by_region
tools.description: Get project ID for a specific region. This is a convenience function that queries IAM and returns the project ID for the specified region name (e.g., 'cn-north-4').

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

tools.name: huawei_resize_cce_nodepool
tools.description: Resize (scale up or down) a CCE node pool to a specific number of nodes. Use this to add or remove nodes in a node pool.

node_count.description: Target node count (desired number of nodes after resize)

scale_group_names.description: Comma-separated list of scale group names to use (default: 'default')

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_scale_cce_workload
tools.description: Scale a CCE workload (Deployment or StatefulSet) to a specified number of replicas. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before scaling.

name.description: Name of the workload (Deployment or StatefulSet)

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm scaling. Without this, scaling will not proceed.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_cluster
tools.description: Delete a CCE cluster. WARNING: This will delete the cluster and all its resources. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

delete_evs.description: Whether to delete associated EVS volumes (default: false)

delete_net.description: Whether to delete associated network resources (default: false)

delete_obs.description: Whether to delete associated OBS buckets (default: false)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_workload
tools.description: Delete a CCE workload (Deployment or StatefulSet). WARNING: This will delete the workload and all its pods. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

name.description: Name of the workload to delete

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_node
tools.description: Delete a node from CCE cluster. WARNING: This will delete the node and all its pods. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

scale_down.description: Whether to scale down pods before deleting (default: true)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.description: Get kubeconfig for a CCE cluster. Returns kubeconfig in JSON and YAML format with cluster endpoints information. The kubeconfig can be used with kubectl to manage the cluster.

tools.name: huawei_list_aom_alerts
tools.description: List AOM alert events (alarm records) from the last 24 hours. Supports filtering by alert status (firing/resolved) and severity (critical/warning/info).

limit.description: Maximum number of alerts to return (default: 100)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_aom_alarm_rules
tools.description: List AOM alarm rules (threshold alarm configurations). Shows the alarm rules that have been configured for monitoring.

limit.description: Maximum number of rules to return (default: 100)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.description: List AOM action rules (notification rules). Shows the configured notification channels (SMN topics) for alerts.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_aom_mute_rules
tools.description: List AOM mute rules (silence rules). Shows the configured silence rules that suppress alerts during maintenance windows.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_aom_current_alarms
tools.description: List AOM events and alerts using ListEvents API. Query active alerts (type=active_alert) or historical alerts (type=history_alert). Returns alert details including severity, resource info, and status.

event_type.description: Query type: 'active_alert' for active alerts, 'history_alert' for historical alerts. Default: 'active_alert'

event_severity.description: Filter by severity: 'Critical', 'Major', 'Minor', 'Info'. Default: all severities

time_range.description: Time range in format 'startTime.endTime.durationMinutes', e.g., '-1.-1.60' for last 60 minutes. Default: last 24 hours

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return (default: 100)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_cce_cluster_inspection
tools.description: CCE集群巡检工具。执行全面的集群健康巡检并生成详细报告：(1)Pod状态巡检-检查重启情况 (2)Node状态巡检 (3)插件Pod监控-CPU/内存>80% (4)节点资源监控-CPU/内存/磁盘>80% (5)Event巡检-异常事件 (6)AOM告警巡检。返回巡检结果、问题列表和详细报告。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_pod_status_inspection
tools.description: Pod状态巡检。检查Pod运行状态、容器重启次数、异常状态识别（CrashLoopBackOff、ImagePullBackOff、OOMKilled、Evicted等）。返回运行/待处理/失败Pod统计、重启Pod列表、异常Pod列表。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_addon_pod_monitoring_inspection
tools.description: 插件Pod监控巡检（kube-system + monitoring命名空间）。检查CPU/内存使用率>80%的插件Pod数量及Top 10。返回高CPU/内存使用率Pod列表。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_biz_pod_monitoring_inspection
tools.description: 业务Pod监控巡检（非kube-system/monitoring命名空间）。检查业务Pod的CPU/内存使用率>80%的Pod数量及Top 10。返回高CPU/内存使用率业务Pod列表。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_node_status_inspection
tools.description: Node状态巡检。检查节点状态（Active/Error/Deleting/Installing/Abnormal）、Ready/NotReady统计。返回节点详情、异常节点列表及原因说明。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_node_resource_inspection
tools.description: 节点资源监控巡检。检查节点CPU/内存/磁盘使用率>80%的节点数量及Top 10。返回高资源使用率节点列表，帮助识别资源瓶颈。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_event_inspection
tools.description: Event巡检。检查集群事件类型统计（Normal/Warning）、关键事件识别（Failed/Error/CrashLoopBackOff/OOMKilled/Evicted/FailedScheduling等）。按原因/命名空间归一统计。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_aom_alarm_inspection
tools.description: AOM告警巡检。获取当前活跃告警，按严重级别分类（Critical/Major/Minor/Info），过滤当前集群相关告警。返回告警详情和按类型归一统计。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_elb_monitoring_inspection
tools.description: ELB负载均衡监控巡检。检查LoadBalancer类型Service的ELB监控数据（连接数、带宽、使用率）、公网EIP带宽监控。识别高连接/高带宽使用率ELB和EIP超限告警。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_AK 环境变量)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_SK 环境变量)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选，如已设置 HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID 环境变量)

tools.name: huawei_cce_cluster_inspection_parallel

tools.name: huawei_network_diagnose
tools.description: CCE工作负载网络问题诊断，自动梳理完整网络链路（Pod→Service→Ingress→ELB→NAT→EIP）并分析链路各组件状态、监控、告警，生成诊断报告。

namespace.description: 工作负载所在命名空间

hours.description: 诊断时间范围（小时），默认1小时

project_id.description: Project ID (可选)

tools.name: huawei_network_diagnose_by_alarm
tools.description: 基于AOM告警触发的工作负载网络问题诊断，自动关联告警对应的工作负载并执行完整网络链路诊断。

namespace.description: 告警关联的工作负载命名空间（可选，自动匹配时可不填）

workload_name.description: 告警关联的工作负载名称（可选，自动匹配时可不填）

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选)

tools.name: huawei_workload_diagnose
tools.description: CCE工作负载异常综合诊断。收集工作负载基础信息、诊断异常Pod（Pending/CrashLoopBackOff/ImagePullBackOff等）、联动节点诊断和网络链路诊断、进行变更关联分析、获取AOM告警，生成含Top3根因的综合诊断报告。

workload_name.description: 工作负载名称（可选，不填则诊断namespace下所有工作负载）

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选)

tools.name: huawei_workload_diagnose_by_alarm
tools.description: 基于AOM告警触发CCE工作负载异常综合诊断。自动从告警信息中解析工作负载名称和命名空间，然后执行完整的工作负载诊断流程。

alarm_info.description: 告警信息（JSON格式或告警名称），包含resource_id/namespace/name等字段

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选)

tools.name: huawei_hibernate_cce_cluster
tools.description: 休眠CCE集群。将集群置于休眠状态，停止控制面计费和工作负载（但保留集群配置）。适用于临时不需要使用集群的场景，可节省成本。唤醒使用huawei_awake_cce_cluster。

ak.description: Access Key ID (可选)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选)

tools.name: huawei_awake_cce_cluster
tools.description: 唤醒休眠的CCE集群。恢复集群至正常运行状态，重新开始控制面计费，工作负载将自动恢复。

sk.description: Secret Access Key (可选)

project_id.description: Project ID (可选)
